workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/~/.nakiros/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
YOU MUST ALWAYS SPEAK OUTPUT in the configured communication_language.
HOTFIX MODE: move fast, skip non-critical steps, minimize scope. Production is impacted.
Fix ONLY what is broken. Flag all out-of-scope improvements as follow-up tickets.
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps.

step.action: Load project config from {project_config} if present. Warn if missing but DO NOT halt — hotfix cannot be blocked by config issues.
Load profile config from {profile_config} when available (optional).
Build effective config. Apply defaults: user_name={default_user_name}, communication_language={default_communication_language}, document_language={default_document_language}.
Check for {workspace_config}. If found, load all repos — identify which ones are impacted by the incident.
Capture {{worklog_start_time}} = now for worklog tracking.

step.critical: Keep this step SHORT. 3 questions max. We need to start fixing.
step.ask: 🚨 HOTFIX MODE What's broken? (one sentence — what symptoms, where in production)
step.action: Capture as {{incident_description}}.
step.ask: Root cause identified? (yes: what? / no: suspected area?)
step.action: Capture as {{root_cause}}.
step.ask: Ticket ID? (if exists — or "new" to create one)
step.action: Capture as {{ticketId}}.

check.action: Create urgent incident ticket via PM MCP with: - Type: Bug - Title: "HOTFIX: {{incident_description}}" - Priority: Critical - Status: In Progress

check.if: ticketId exists and pm_tool is configured
check.action: Fetch ticket details via PM MCP. Transition to {pm_in_progress_status} immediately.
Post incident comment: "🚨 HOTFIX started | Root cause: {{root_cause}} | Started: {{worklog_start_time}}"

step.action: Resolve branch name: {hotfix_branch_prefix}{{ticketId}}-{{short-slug-from-incident}}
Checkout main/master (or configured production branch).
Pull latest: git pull origin main.
Create branch: git checkout -b {{branchName}}.
Persist minimal run state to {active_run_file}: ticketId, branchName, hotfix=true, worklog_start_time.

step.critical: Scope is LOCKED to the incident. No refactoring, no "while we're here" changes.
Every change must be directly traceable to the root cause.
step.action: Load Developer persona from {project-root}/~/.nakiros/agents/dev.md.
Implement the minimal change that stops the bleeding. Target only the files/functions directly involved in the root cause.
Write or update a targeted test that reproduces the bug and now passes with the fix.
Run tests for the affected module only (full suite if fast, targeted if suite is slow).

check.action: Create a follow-up ticket note (local) with the improvement. DO NOT implement it now.

step.action: Stage and commit: git add [affected files only]

Commit message (ENGLISH): "fix(hotfix): {{incident_description}} ({{ticketId}})

Root cause: {{root_cause}}
Fix: [one sentence]

Fixes {{ticketId}}"
Push: git push -u origin {{branchName}}

check.action: Post progress comment on {{ticketId}}: "✓ Fix committed | Branch: {{branchName}} | Change: [1 sentence summary]"

step.action:
Generate expedited MR content in {{document_language}}:
**[HOTFIX] {{ticketId}} — {{incident_description}}**
## Incident Summary {{incident_description}}
## Root Cause {{root_cause}}
## Fix Applied [What was changed and why — file-level detail]
## Test Verification - Test added/updated: [file path] - Test command: [how to run] - Expected: [what passes now]
## Rollback Plan git revert {{commit_sha}} and redeploy
## Deployment Notes [Any migrations, env vars, service restarts needed — or "None"]
⚡ EXPEDITED REVIEW — production impact
Attempt MR/PR creation in {{git_host}} using available CLI (gh pr create / gitlab mr create).

check.action: Save MR content to {workflow_runs_dir}/{{ticketId}}-hotfix-mr.md for manual creation.
check.ask: Paste the MR URL when created:

step.action: Compute worklog: from {{worklog_start_time}} to now, rounded to {worklog_rounding_minutes} minutes, minimum {minimum_worklog_minutes} minutes.

check.action: Post final incident comment in {{document_language}}: "✅ HOTFIX COMPLETE MR: {{mr_url}} Time: {{total_worklog_minutes}} min Root cause: {{root_cause}} Fix: [1 sentence] Next: Await expedited review + deploy"

step.action: Mark run state as completed in {active_run_file}.
